slides.title: Eat the rainbow, *age more slowly*.
slides.sub: The colors on your plate carry the plant compounds tied to longevity. Variety is the quiet secret.

slides.title: Color means compounds
slides.body: Each bright pigment is a different polyphenol or antioxidant. More colors *can mean* more protective plant compounds.

slides.title: Different colors, different jobs
slides.body: Reds, greens, purples and oranges support different parts of the body. Each one *may help* in its own way.

slides.title: Variety beats any superfood
slides.body: No single food does it all. A wide *range of plants* tends to serve you better than one trendy pick.

slides.title: Aim for more colors
slides.body: Try to reach three or four colors per plate. It is a simple rule that *can guide* nearly every meal.

slides.title: Let color lead the way
slides.body: Build plates around a mix of plants. Eating the rainbow *may support* a longer, healthier life.

slides.title: Eat well, *age well*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks the food, sleep and movement that help you age well, all in one simple daily score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
The colors on your plate are not just for looks. 🌿

Each bright pigment carries plant compounds tied to longevity, and variety beats any single superfood. Aim for three or four colors a plate. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns those food habits into one daily score → link in bio.
youtube_title: Why Eating the Rainbow Helps You Age Well
